title: carex distans subsp. oranensis
intro: Carex distans subsp. oranensis, also known as the narrow-leaved sedge, is a type of perennial plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The narrow-leaved sedge has been reported to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Traditionally, the plant can be prepared into herbal infusions, tinctures, or decoctions for its medicinal uses.
